Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Conditions not correct - Variant coding not performed
Conditions not correct - Standard pre-condition not fulfilled
No response from the head unit
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG
MAGNA E-Car Systems GmbH & Co OG

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: EoL Test Of FuSa Patches Start
EoL Test Of FuSa Patches Stop
EoL Test Of FuSa Patches Results
DataRead.FuSa Patch Position And Params Read
DataRead.Calibration Status And Result - Plant Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read
DataWrite.FuSa Patch Position And Params Write
DataWrite.Calibration Status And Result - Plant Write

Test.Description: The power supply in the system is too low.
The power supply in the system is too high.
The power supply is too low.
The power supply is too high.
The reversing camera has a malfunction. System Internal Failures.
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Missing calibration.
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Not configured.
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Internal voltage 5 V out of range
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Internal voltage 2.8 V out of range
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Internal voltage 1.8 V out of range
The reversing camera has a malfunction. MCU core voltage out of range
The reversing camera has a malfunction. I2C communication error
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Imager temperature too high
The reversing camera has a malfunction. MCU clock abnormal
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Read serializer register value not equal to written value
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Imager/Companion chip error
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Hardware error
The reversing camera has a malfunction. FFT not executed
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Overlay generation not executed
The reversing camera has a malfunction. MCU watchdog active
The reversing camera has a malfunction. Memory violation occured.
The reversing camera has a malfunction. MPU Error
The current vehicle identification number is incorrect or not present.
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the control unit ''combustion engine'' has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Communication with the control unit ''combustion engine'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit "Transmission" has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with control unit "Power steering" has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with the signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with control unit ''Audio or COMAND'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction. Signal invalid.
Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Soft top control'' has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Communication with control unit ''Soft top control'' has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with control unit "Steering Column Control Module" has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with the trailer connection unit has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Communication with the trailer connection unit has a malfunction. Missing Message
Communication with control unit "Transmission" has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Communication with control unit "Power steering" has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Implausible data were received from the signal acquisition and actuation module. Signal Invalid.
Implausible data were received from the instrument cluster. Signal Invalid.
Communication with control unit "Steering Column Control Module" has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
Implausible data were received from the Audio/COMAND operating unit. Signal Invalid.
